creator: vanhu@netasq.com
text:
Version 0.7.0 of ipsec-tools is out, which fixes some minor problems,
adds some major features, fixes some gcc 4.x compilation problems, but
which probably won't let you win at the lottery :-)

Note: patch-src__racoon__eaytest.c patch-src__racoon__plog.c and
patch-src__racoon__var.h are obsolete.
